touches.ai_summary: Inbound inquiry from Zainab Tanaka at AspenScope requesting information about call recording and sales coaching solutions for their RevOps team.

Initial qualification call with Zainab. Discussed current pain points with manual call reviews and lack of coaching infrastructure. AspenScope has 25 reps across sales and success teams. Zainab is evaluating solutions to scale coaching without adding headcount.

questions_asked.question: Does your platform support both inbound and outbound call recording?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we support all call types including phone, Zoom, Teams, and other platforms

questions_asked.question: What's driving this initiative right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our sales team grew 40% last year but coaching hasn't scaled. We're seeing inconsistent performance across reps

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up qualification call. Zainab shared more about their tech stack (Salesforce, Gong competitor not currently used) and budget timeline. Confirmed they're looking to implement before Q3. Discussed integration requirements and data security concerns given their cybersecurity focus.

questions_asked.question: How does your solution integrate with Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Native bidirectional sync - call data, sentiment, and key moments flow directly into SFDC records

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in this evaluation?
questions_asked.answer: Luke Rogers, our COO, will need to sign off. Also need to loop in IT for security review

objections: Need to ensure SOC 2 compliance and data encryption standards meet our client requirements

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with security documentation, SOC 2 certification, and encryption standards. Included case study from similar managed services company. Confirmed next discovery call time.
Check-in email asking if Zainab had questions about the security documentation. Offered to connect her with a customer reference in the cybersecurity space.

questions_asked.question: Can you share the contact for that reference customer?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, connecting you with the VP of Sales at SecureNet Solutions

touches.ai_summary: Quick follow-up call to confirm discovery agenda and attendees. Zainab confirmed Luke Rogers will join the main discovery session. Discussed specific use cases they want to explore: onboarding acceleration, objection handling coaching, and deal review efficiency.

questions_asked.question: What does success look like 6 months after implementing our solution?
questions_asked.answer: Faster ramp time for new hires and measurable improvement in conversion rates across the team

touches.ai_summary: First deep discovery call with Zainab. Walked through their current process: managers manually reviewing 2-3 calls per rep per week, taking 5-6 hours of manager time. No structured coaching framework. Reps lack visibility into their own performance patterns. Discussed unlimited automation tier benefits for their use case.

questions_asked.question: Can your AI identify specific talk tracks that correlate with closed deals?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, our analytics can surface winning patterns and flag coaching opportunities based on your best performers

questions_asked.question: How many calls per week does each rep typically conduct?
questions_asked.answer: Varies by role - AEs average 15-20, SDRs 40-50, CSMs 10-15

objections: Managers are concerned about reps feeling micromanaged if all calls are recorded

touches.ai_summary: Continued discovery focusing on integration requirements and workflow. Discussed how call insights would surface in Salesforce, automatic sync with their deal stages, and custom coaching scorecards. Zainab interested in tracking specific metrics: talk-to-listen ratio, competitor mentions, pricing discussion quality.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize what triggers a coaching alert?
questions_asked.answer: Fully customizable - you can set thresholds for any metric or keyword pattern

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for rolling this out to the team?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally pilot with 10 reps in May, full rollout by end of Q2

touches.ai_summary: Final discovery session covering pricing tiers, implementation timeline, and success metrics. Discussed unlimited automation tier - Zainab sees value in automated coaching recommendations and deal risk alerts. Clarified that 25 seats would cover their entire revenue team. Talked through ROI: saving 20 manager hours/week and estimated 10-15% improvement in conversion rates.

questions_asked.question: What kind of support do you provide during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated CSM, weekly check-ins first month, and ongoing best practice workshops

questions_asked.question: Any concerns about moving forward with a pilot?
questions_asked.answer: Just need to make sure we have executive buy-in on budget and approach

next_steps: Include Luke Rogers in next session

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation session with Zainab and AspenScope's IT lead. Walked through API documentation, data retention policies, role-based access controls, and compliance features. IT lead satisfied with security posture. Tested Salesforce integration in sandbox environment. Discussed GDPR and call recording consent workflows.

questions_asked.question: How is data encrypted in transit and at rest?
questions_asked.answer: AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit, with key rotation every 90 days

questions_asked.question: Can we restrict certain calls from being recorded?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, full control via user settings, keyword exclusions, or manual recording toggle

questions_asked.question: Any technical blockers we should address before the demo?
questions_asked.answer: No blockers - our Salesforce admin can help with the integration setup

touches.ai_summary: Full team demo with Zainab, Luke Rogers (COO), and three sales managers. Showed live call analysis, coaching workflow, and automated insights. Team particularly engaged with the deal risk scoring and competitive intelligence features. Luke asked detailed questions about ROI measurement and team adoption strategies. Meeting rescheduled once due to Luke's conflict.

questions_asked.question: How quickly can reps access call summaries after a conversation?
questions_asked.answer: Real-time processing - summaries available within 2-3 minutes of call end

questions_asked.question: Can we track improvement in specific skills over time?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, longitudinal skill tracking with trend analysis and peer benchmarking

questions_asked.question: What would a phased rollout look like for your team?
questions_asked.answer: Luke: Start with AE team as pilot, then expand to SDRs and CSMs based on results

objections: One sales manager concerned about learning curve and time to value

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Zainab. Walked through 25-seat unlimited automation package at $20,200 ACV. Discussed 3-month pilot structure, success metrics, and expansion path. Zainab positive on solution fit but indicated budget is tight - may need to negotiate on price or start with smaller pilot.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the per-seat pricing for a multi-year commitment?
questions_asked.answer: We can explore options - would you be open to a 2-year agreement?

questions_asked.question: What's the budget you're working within?
questions_asked.answer: We allocated $15k for this initiative, but I can make the case for more if ROI is clear

objections: Price is above initial budget allocation

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment meeting with Luke Rogers and Zainab. Luke supportive of the initiative and sees strategic value in building coaching infrastructure. Acknowledged budget constraints but willing to approve if we can find middle ground on pricing. Discussed business case: current cost of missed opportunities vs. investment in coaching platform.

questions_asked.question: What do your most successful customers see in terms of performance lift?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 12-18% improvement in win rates within first 6 months, faster ramp for new hires

questions_asked.question: Can we reduce scope to fit budget or do we need all 25 seats?
questions_asked.answer: We could start with 15 seats for the pilot, but you'd miss coverage on the CSM team

questions_asked.question: Would a phased expansion approach work better from a budget perspective?
questions_asked.answer: Luke: Possibly, but I'd rather do it right the first time than piecemeal it

next_steps: Explore pricing options that fit budget

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Zainab and Luke summarizing executive meeting. Outlined three pricing scenarios: full 25 seats at standard price, 15-seat pilot with expansion clause, or 25 seats with extended payment terms. Asked for feedback on preferred approach.

questions_asked.question: Can you include the ROI calculator in your response?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, attached - shows breakeven at 8% win rate improvement

touches.ai_summary: Check-in email asking if Zainab had a chance to review the pricing scenarios with Luke. Offered to jump on a quick call to walk through the ROI model in more detail.

Pricing discussion with Zainab. She confirmed they want all 25 seats but need to land closer to $15k to get finance approval without escalation. Discussed discount options and contract length tradeoffs. Zainab committed to bringing a specific number to Luke if we can work within that range.

questions_asked.question: Would a 2-year commit help you justify a larger discount?
questions_asked.answer: Potentially - we typically do annual contracts but could consider it for the right price

objections: Finance unlikely to approve anything above $16k without CFO escalation

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Zainab. Presented revised offer: 25 seats, unlimited automation, $20,200 ACV with 31% discount bringing total to $13,838 annually, 2-year commitment. Zainab appreciative but needs to validate timeline and payment structure with Luke before confirming.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can structure quarterly billing at no additional cost

touches.ai_summary: Pricing alignment call - rescheduled once due to Luke's schedule conflict. Zainab and Luke both on the call. Reviewed final pricing structure, payment terms, and implementation timeline. Luke asked about early termination clauses and performance guarantees. Overall positive but Luke wants to ensure flexibility if adoption doesn't meet expectations.

questions_asked.question: What happens if we don't see the ROI we're expecting?
questions_asked.answer: We include a 90-day success check-in and can adjust the program, but no refund provisions

questions_asked.question: Are you comfortable moving forward with this structure?
questions_asked.answer: Luke: Yes, as long as we have quarterly reviews and can course-correct if needed

objections: Luke concerned about being locked into 2-year commitment if results don't materialize

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up negotiation call to address Luke's concerns about contract flexibility. Agreed to add a 12-month opt-out clause with 60-day notice if specific success metrics aren't met. Luke satisfied with the compromise. Zainab confirmed this should be the last hurdle before legal review.

questions_asked.question: What are the specific metrics we'd track for the opt-out clause?
questions_asked.answer: We'll define them together, but typically: user adoption %, win rate change, and manager time savings

questions_asked.question: When can we get this to your legal team?
questions_asked.answer: Zainab: I'll loop them in tomorrow - should be a quick review, maybe a week

touches.ai_summary: Final pricing confirmation call with Zainab. Reviewed contract terms one last time: 25 seats, $20,200 ACV with 31.6% discount, 2-year term with 12-month performance opt-out, quarterly billing, Q2 implementation start. Zainab confirmed legal has no major issues and expects to sign within a week. Discussed kickoff planning and CSM assignment.

questions_asked.question: Any remaining blockers on your end?
questions_asked.answer: No, just waiting for final legal sign-off. Should have signature by Friday
